description: On the same 24 fresh cases, compare the current 11-prompt generator panel with four added specialists. All 60 calls are banked once for call-free combination analysis.

strategies.name: Format-Hardened Stable Eleven
strategies.description: The current eleven generation lenses with only a stricter instruction to copy the block identifier exactly.

stages.instruction: Work carefully on this smaller case set. For each sequence, compare global structures, verify a late suffix when possible, and return the exact continuation supported by the strongest compact rule.

strategies.name: Four Structural Specialists
strategies.description: Four additional generators target bounded state, phase-dependent state, variable segments, and alternate coordinate systems without assuming a closed benchmark taxonomy.

stages.instruction: Work carefully on this smaller case set. Use the assigned structural lens as a serious alternative, but reject it if it does not replay the entire prefix exactly.
